about.whoWeAreText: REMOTE-IT is a software agency specialized in frontend development, focused on creating high-quality, accessible, and performant digital solutions.
about.whatWeDoText: We specialize in frontend development, design systems (Figma → Storybook), and accessibility audits. Our goal is to help companies grow digitally through modern web technologies.
